info.title: The Odds API
info.description:
Sports betting odds, scores and event data from a range of bookmakers across the US, UK, EU and Australia. To access the API, get a free API key from https://the-odds-api.com/#get-access. The API key is passed as the `apiKey` query parameter on every request.

Usage cost is reported on every response via the `x-requests-last`, `x-requests-used` and `x-requests-remaining` headers. The `/v4/sports` and `/v4/sports/{sport}/events` endpoints do not count against the usage quota.

tags.name: odds
tags.description: Live and upcoming bookmaker odds for a sport, region and set of markets.

tags.name: scores
tags.description: Live, upcoming and recently completed games with scores.

tags.name: events
tags.description: In-play and pre-match events for a sport, without odds.

tags.name: participants
tags.description: Teams or individual participants for a sport.

tags.name: historical
tags.description: Historical snapshots of odds and events at a point in time. Available on paid plans only.

get.description: Returns a list of available sports and tournaments. Use a sport `key` in the odds, scores and events endpoints. This request does not count against the usage quota.
Returns a list of live and upcoming games for a sport, with bookmaker odds for the specified regions and markets. Usage cost is 1 per region per market returned.

200.description: A list of live and upcoming games with bookmaker odds.

get.description: Returns a list of live and upcoming games for a sport, and optionally recently completed games. Live and completed games include scores. Usage cost is 1 for live and upcoming games, or 2 when `daysFrom` is set.

200.description: A list of live, upcoming and optionally recently completed games. Scores are included for live and recently completed games.

get.description: Returns a list of in-play and pre-match events for a sport, without odds. This request does not count against the usage quota.

200.description: A list of in-play and pre-match events.

get.description: Returns odds for a single event across all available markets, including additional and player-prop markets that are not returned by the featured odds endpoint. Usage cost is 1 per unique market per region.

200.description: Odds for the single event across the requested markets.

get.description: Returns the market keys available for each bookmaker for a single event. Useful for discovering which additional and player-prop markets can be requested from the event odds endpoint.

200.description: The market keys available per bookmaker for the event.

get.description: Returns the list of participants (teams or individuals) for a sport. Usage cost is 1.

200.description: A list of participants for the sport.

get.description: Returns a snapshot of games with bookmaker odds for a sport, as they appeared at (or just before) the requested `date`. Paid plans only. Usage cost is 10 per region per market returned.

200.description: A historical snapshot of games with odds.

get.description: Returns a snapshot of events for a sport as they appeared at the requested `date`, without odds. Paid plans only. Usage cost is 1 (or 0 when no events are found).

Returns historical odds for a single event across the requested markets, as they appeared at the requested `date`. Additional and player-prop markets are available for snapshots from 2023-05-03T05:30:00Z onward. Paid plans only.

200.description: A historical snapshot of odds for the single event.

ApiKeyAuth.name: apiKey
ApiKeyAuth.description: API subscription key (~40 characters). Get a free key at https://the-odds-api.com/#get-access.

Sport.name: sport
Sport.description: Sport key, obtained from the `/v4/sports` endpoint (e.g. `americanfootball_nfl`). For the odds endpoints, the special value `upcoming` returns the next 8 upcoming games across all sports.

EventId.name: eventId
EventId.description: Event id, obtained from the `/events` endpoint.

Regions.name: regions
Regions.description: Comma-separated list of regions that determine which bookmakers appear in the response. Allowed values: `us`, `us2`, `uk`, `au`, `eu`. Each region counts as 1 request against the usage quota for each market. See https://the-odds-api.com/sports-odds-data/bookmaker-apis.html for the bookmakers in each region.

Markets.name: markets
Markets.description: Comma-separated list of featured odds markets to return. Defaults to `h2h`. Allowed values: `h2h` (head-to-head / moneyline), `spreads` (points handicaps), `totals` (over/under), `outrights` (futures), `h2h_lay`, `outrights_lay`. Each market counts as 1 request against the usage quota. `outrights` is only available for select sports.

MarketsAll.name: markets
MarketsAll.description: Comma-separated list of market keys. In addition to the featured markets (`h2h`, `spreads`, `totals`, `outrights`), the event endpoints accept additional and player-prop market keys (e.g. `alternate_spreads`, `player_points`, `player_pass_tds`). See https://the-odds-api.com/sports-odds-data/betting-markets.html for the full list. Each market counts as 1 request per region against the quota.

EventIds.name: eventIds
EventIds.description: Comma-separated list of game/event ids. Filters the response to the specified events.

Bookmakers.name: bookmakers
Bookmakers.description: Comma-separated list of bookmaker keys. Filters the response to the specified bookmakers, overriding `regions`. Each bookmaker counts as 1 region against the usage quota.

CommenceTimeFrom.name: commenceTimeFrom
CommenceTimeFrom.description: Filter to games commencing after this ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g. `2023-09-09T00:00:00Z`).

CommenceTimeTo.name: commenceTimeTo
CommenceTimeTo.description: Filter to games commencing before this ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g. `2023-09-10T23:59:59Z`).

Date.name: date
Date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the snapshot to return. The API returns the snapshot at or immediately before this time (e.g. `2021-10-18T12:00:00Z`).

DaysFrom.name: daysFrom
DaysFrom.description: The number of days in the past from which to return completed games. Valid values are 1, 2 or 3. When omitted, only live and upcoming games are returned.

All.name: all
All.description: When set to `true`, returns both in-season and out-of-season sports. When omitted, only recently updated (in-season) sports are returned.

IncludeLinks.name: includeLinks
IncludeLinks.description: When `true`, includes bookmaker links (`link`), market links and bet slip links in the response where available.

IncludeSids.name: includeSids
IncludeSids.description: When `true`, includes source ids (`sid`) for bookmakers, markets and outcomes where available.

IncludeBetLimits.name: includeBetLimits
IncludeBetLimits.description: When `true`, includes bet limits (`bet_limit`) on outcomes for betting exchanges where available.

IncludeRotationNumbers.name: includeRotationNumbers
IncludeRotationNumbers.description: When `true`, includes rotation numbers on events where available.

IncludeMultipliers.name: includeMultipliers
IncludeMultipliers.description: When `true`, includes pick multipliers for US daily-fantasy (DFS) sites where available.

XRequestsRemaining.description: The number of usage credits remaining until the quota resets.

XRequestsUsed.description: The number of usage credits used since the last quota reset.

XRequestsLast.description: The usage cost of the most recent request.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthenticated or unauthorized. The API key may be missing or invalid (unauthenticated), or it may be at its usage limit (unauthorized). The response body contains more detail.

NotFound.description: The requested sport or event was not found.

InvalidParams.description: One or more query params are invalid. The response body contains more detail.

Throttled.description: The request was throttled because requests are being sent too frequently.

SportKey.description: A unique slug for the sport. Use as the `sport` path param.

SportTitle.description: A presentable title of the sport. Occasionally changes (e.g. on a league name or sponsorship change).

EventId.description: A unique 32-character identifier for the event.

CommenceTime.description: The event start time, ISO 8601 formatted. Returned as a unix timestamp integer when `dateFormat=unix`.

LastUpdate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the data was last captured. Returned as a unix timestamp integer when `dateFormat=unix`.

HomeTeam.description: The home team. For sports without home/away (e.g. MMA, tennis) this is one of the participants. Null for outrights (futures) events.

AwayTeam.description: The away team. For sports without home/away (e.g. MMA, tennis) this is one of the participants. Null for outrights (futures) events.

group.description: A broader grouping the sport belongs to.

description.description: A brief description of the sport. Subject to change.

active.description: Indicates whether the sport is currently in season.

has_outrights.description: Indicates whether the sport has outrights (futures) markets.

Outcome.description: A single selectable outcome within a market.

name.description: The outcome name. For `totals` markets this is `Over` or `Under`; for other markets it is the team/participant name or `Draw`.

description.description: Additional context for the outcome, e.g. the player name for player-prop markets. Present only on some markets.

price.description: The odds for the outcome. Format is set by `oddsFormat` (decimal by default).

point.description: The handicap or line for the outcome. Applicable to `spreads`, `totals` and many additional/prop markets; absent for `h2h` and `outrights`.

link.description: Deep link to the outcome on the bookmaker. Present when `includeLinks=true`.

sid.description: Source id of the outcome. Present when `includeSids=true`.

bet_limit.description: Maximum bet limit (betting exchanges). Present when `includeBetLimits=true`.

Market.description: A betting market offered by a bookmaker.

key.description: The market key, e.g. `h2h`, `spreads`, `totals`, `outrights`, or an additional/player-prop key such as `player_points`.

link.description: Deep link to the market. Present when `includeLinks=true`.

sid.description: Source id of the market. Present when `includeSids=true`.

MarketKey.description: A market key available for a bookmaker (no outcomes).

Bookmaker.description: A bookmaker and its markets for an event.

key.description: A unique slug (key) for the bookmaker.

title.description: A formatted title for the bookmaker.

link.description: Deep link to the bookmaker event page. Present when `includeLinks=true`.

sid.description: Source id of the bookmaker event. Present when `includeSids=true`.

BookmakerMarkets.description: A bookmaker and the market keys it offers for an event.

EventWithMarkets.description: A game/event with the market keys offered by each bookmaker.

Score.description: A participant and their most recent score.

score.description: The most recent score for the participant.

completed.description: True if the game has finished, otherwise false.

scores.description: A list of teams and their scores. Null (or empty) if the game has not started.

last_update.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when scores were last updated. Null if not started.

Participant.description: A team or individual participant in a sport.

id.description: A unique identifier for the participant.

HistoricalOddsSnapshot.description: A historical snapshot of games with odds at a point in time.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the returned snapshot.

previous_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the preceding snapshot, or null if none.

next_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the following snapshot, or null if none.

HistoricalEventsSnapshot.description: A historical snapshot of events at a point in time.

HistoricalEventOddsSnapshot.description: A historical snapshot of odds for a single event at a point in time.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
message.example: The api key is invalid or has been removed.

details_url.description: A link to documentation with more detail, where available.
